components.name: AnimatedContent
components.title: AnimatedContent
components.description: Wrapper that animates any children on scroll or mount with configurable direction, distance, duration, easing and disappear options.

components.name: BlobCursor
components.title: BlobCursor
components.description: Organic blob cursor that smoothly follows the pointer with inertia and elastic morphing.

components.name: ClickSpark
components.title: ClickSpark
components.description: Creates particle spark bursts at click position.

components.name: Crosshair
components.title: Crosshair
components.description: Custom crosshair cursor with tracking, and link hover effects.

components.name: Cubes
components.title: Cubes
components.description: 3D rotating cube cluster. Supports auto-rotation or hover interaction.

components.name: ElectricBorder
components.title: ElectricBorder
components.description: Jittery electric energy border with animated arcs, glow and adjustable intensity.

components.name: FadeContent
components.title: FadeContent
components.description: Simple directional fade / slide entrance / exit wrapper with threshold-based activation.

components.name: GlareHover
components.title: GlareHover
components.description: Adds a realistic moving glare highlight on hover over any element.

components.name: GradualBlur
components.title: GradualBlur
components.description: Progressively un-blurs content based on scroll or trigger creating a cinematic reveal.

components.name: GhostCursor
components.title: GhostCursor
components.description: Semi-transparent ghost cursor that smoothly follows the real cursor with a trailing effect.

components.name: ImageTrail
components.title: ImageTrail
components.description: Cursor-based image trail with several built-in variants.

components.name: LogoLoop
components.title: LogoLoop
components.description: Continuously looping marquee of brand or tech logos with seamless repeat and hover pause.

components.name: Magnet
components.title: Magnet
components.description: Elements magnetically ease toward the cursor then settle back with spring physics.

components.name: MagnetLines
components.title: MagnetLines
components.description: Animated field lines bend toward the cursor.

components.name: MetaBalls
components.title: MetaBalls
components.description: Liquid metaball blobs that merge and separate with smooth implicit surface animation.

components.name: Strands
components.title: Strands
components.description: Glowing ribbon-like strands that ripple and weave across a transparent canvas.

components.name: MetallicPaint
components.title: MetallicPaint
components.description: Liquid metallic paint shader which can be applied to SVG elements.

components.name: Noise
components.title: Noise
components.description: Animated film grain / noise overlay adding subtle texture and motion.

components.name: PixelTrail
components.title: PixelTrail
components.description: Pixelated cursor trail emitting fading squares with retro digital feel.

components.name: PixelTransition

components.name: Ribbons
components.title: Ribbons

components.name: ShapeBlur
components.title: ShapeBlur
components.description: Morphing blurred geometric shape. The effect occurs on hover.

components.name: SplashCursor

components.name: StarBorder
components.title: StarBorder

components.name: StickerPeel

components.name: TargetCursor

components.name: Antigravity

components.name: OrbitImages
